response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetically matches the provided reference lyrics for the song 'Ridin' on Dreams'. 2. JSON Usage: Lyrics used as the primary guide for transcription and translation. The opening JOYSOUND announcement is subtitled as a prominent visual event. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are strictly anchored to vocal activations. Instantaneous transitions (Line 1 'e' equals Line 2 's') are applied for continuous phrases to prevent cascading delays during the rhythmic intro and first verse.

subtitles.original: hololive 7th fes. Ridin'on Dreams JOYSOUND みるハコで配信決定!!
subtitles.english: [Title: hololive 7th fes. Ridin'on Dreams - Now on JOYSOUND Miruhaco!!]

subtitles.original: ねえ、君がいたからだよ
ねえ、ありがとうを何度も
subtitles.english: ...I want to say "thank you" over and over again.

subtitles.original: 今すぐに伝えたいんだ
subtitles.english: I want to tell you right now!

subtitles.original: さあ乗り込もう！ Ridin' on Dreams
subtitles.english: Alright, let's get on board! Ridin' on Dreams!

subtitles.original: あぁ 小さな夢から

subtitles.english: No matter how many times we get lost...

subtitles.original: ちょっとの不安だってさ
subtitles.english: Even the slightest bit of anxiety...

subtitles.original: 吹き飛ばせちゃうんだよ
subtitles.english: ...we can just blow it all away!
